name: Signal
description: End-to-end encrypted messaging application developed by the Signal Foundation. The Signal Protocol has become the industry reference implementation for secure messaging.
rationale: Signal's protocol is the most extensively peer-reviewed and audited secure messaging implementation available. Metadata protection features (sealed sender, minimal data retention) are above average for consumer messaging. The organization has a strong legal track record of disclosing minimal data in response to subpoenas. Phone number requirement for signup is the primary privacy limitation. Not self-hostable.
